issue_detail: The article likely functions mainly as a rewrite of a Gate Institutional weekly report rather than adding substantial original reporting or analysis.
why_it_matters: People-first guidance favors content with substantial added value, not thin derivative summaries.
suggested_solution: Add original analysis comparing current funding and volume conditions with prior weeks and explain what changed.

issue_detail: The core market claims appear to depend on Gate Institutional reporting and should be tied directly to the underlying report or dataset.
why_it_matters: Financial and market-data content needs clear attribution and evidence to build trust.
suggested_solution: Link directly to the Gate Institutional report and identify which figures come from Gate versus Coincu's interpretation.

issue_detail: The title compresses multiple signals into one headline: positive BTC funding, rising CEX volume, and rising TradFi volume.
why_it_matters: A headline with multiple data claims needs matching evidence and structure in the body or it feels stitched together.
suggested_solution: Structure the article into separate sections for funding rate, CEX volume, and TradFi volume, then add a synthesis section.

issue_detail: Without added interpretation, readers may finish with only a restatement of an institutional note.
why_it_matters: Helpful content should leave readers with clearer understanding, not just a shorter rewrite of another source.
suggested_solution: Add a table with metric, latest reading, prior reading, and why traders should care.

issue_detail: Terms like funding rate, CEX, and TradFi volume may be used without enough framing for general readers.
why_it_matters: Even market-savvy content should define key terms briefly so readers can follow the argument.
suggested_solution: Add a one-sentence explanation of funding rate and a short note clarifying what TradFi volume refers to.

issue_detail: This article type only works well when internal links go to tightly relevant market-structure pages.
why_it_matters: Weakly related links dilute topical coherence and reduce user value.
suggested_solution: Use links to related BTC funding, ETF flow, exchange-volume, or institutional-market pages only.

issue_detail: This is a data-driven market article and likely benefits from a supporting chart or comparison table.
why_it_matters: A visual can improve comprehension and trust for funding-rate and volume claims.
suggested_solution: Add a chart of BTC funding-rate trend or a simple table comparing CEX and TradFi volume changes.

issue_detail: If the article does not clearly separate sourced facts from Coincu interpretation, trust is reduced.
why_it_matters: Readers need to know what is reported, what is measured, and what is editorial interpretation.
suggested_solution: Label source-derived figures clearly and separate them from commentary or inference.
